metadata.source: CFTC TFF Futures Only public reporting
limitations: CFTC report dates are Tuesday and publication is later in the week; rows use a conservative Saturday 00:00 UTC availableAfter.
BTC and Micro BTC positions are aggregated in BTC-equivalent contract exposure using fixed contract sizes.
This cache is context-only until a COT event study passes out-of-sample validation.
